subject: Mercenary Tao (Dragon Ball Super) — bald figure in a patterned robe holding a glowing purple energy sphere, surrounded by pink energy, in a tournament setting with palm trees visible
description: A bald male-presenting figure in a decorated patterned robe holds a large glowing purple energy sphere in one raised hand. Pink and purple energy crackles around him. The background suggests an outdoor tournament arena with palm trees visible. The figure's posture is confident and menacing. The composition is a mid-shot framing the figure from the waist up with one arm raised.
foreground: bald robed figure holding a glowing purple energy sphere, surrounded by crackling energy
background: outdoor arena, palm trees, purple-pink energy
